morningBrief.headline: Variable Conditions
morningBrief.body: Zero new inches, but who's complaining? 18.9" this week means conditions are still prime. Nearly full mountain access with 167 of 170 trails spinning. Mixed precipitation expected. Rain at base, snow up top. Dress in layers.

morningBrief.headline: Arctic Air in Place
